brandFlavor.hooks.standard: They reached out cold. The pitch deck looks polished.
brandFlavor.hooks.controversy_high: They want to monetize your scandal before the news cycle moves on.
brandFlavor.hooks.trend_match: The algorithm flagged you. They want in before everyone else does.
brandFlavor.hooks.famous: Your name opens doors now. They came knocking.
brandFlavor.hooks.desperate: They’re running out of options — and they need you tonight.
brandFlavor.hooks.newcomer: A scout caught a clip. Small offer, but it’s a foot in the door.
